description.full: ByteHR AI is an enterprise-grade HR assistant that delivers instant, accurate answers to employee questions on company policies, benefits, leave entitlements, payroll, and onboarding - powered by advanced AI and your organisation's official HR documentation across Albania, Serbia, and global operations.

commands.title: Help
commands.description: Show available commands and how to use ByteHR Assistant

commands.title: Vacation
commands.description: Ask about vacation and annual leave policy

commands.title: Benefits
commands.description: Ask about employee benefits and perks

commands.title: SickLeave
commands.description: Ask about sick leave and medical policy

commands.title: Onboarding
commands.description: Ask about onboarding and new employee procedures
